Nadimul Haque, Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha) as a member of the Haj Committee of India for a period up to 8th June, 2019 with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette; and for the purpose, makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of External Affairs number S.O. 2024(E), dated the 9th June, 2016, published in the Gazette of India, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely:— In the said notification, for serial number (5) and the entry relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:— “(5) Shri Md. Nadimul Haque —Member” Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha) Chairman, West Bengal State Haj Committee [F. No. 02/06/2017-Haj] J. ALAM, Jt. Secy. (Haj &Waqf) Note: The principal notification for appointing members to the Haj Committee of India was published in Gazette of India, Extraordinary, vide number S.O. 2024(E), dated 9th June, 2016 and subsequently amended vide notification number S.O. 4088(E), dated 19th December,2016. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. ALOK KUMAR Digitally signed by ALOK KUMAR Date: 2018.06.18 22:17:54 +05'30' -- 2 of 2 --
